_note: Fast-food fry-timer beep alarm (the McDonald's fry-station piezo, owner req 2026-07-15). Synthesized in-repo (numpy, 2.9 kHz band-limited square) - public domain, no source recording, safe for monetized clips. Wired as a LATER option on the fail + awkward_silence beats in config/sfx_cues.json (never auto-picked while scratch/crickets are stocked - promote it by moving it up that beat's list). The 3-beep short burst ALSO rotates live in assets/sfx/pop/ (punchline_light lane).
